_usage: Used by validate_plan.py rule R002 (shoulder lock). Each top-level key is a body zone. The 'activation_keywords' list contains case-insensitive substrings matched against athlete_static.md. If ANY keyword matches, the corresponding lock rule activates. Override this file in config/injury_locks.json with athlete-specific keywords.

shoulder.note: Override in config/injury_locks.json with athlete-specific keywords (e.g. language-specific terms)
